programme.title: She Shoots Straight
programme.desc: One by one, the Huangs died in the course of safeguarding law and order in Hong Kong. First, the father and then the two elder sons gave their lives in action. That leaves Tsung-pao, the youngest son, and four daughters. They are all police officers. What makes the mother prouder is Tsung-pao's marrying a senior policewoman Mina. Old Mrs. Huang is hoping to see a grandson to carry on the lawmen family tree. But the sisters don't like Mina. They make sure she does not have a good time. Mina suffers in silence. A raid on a Vietnamese gang was ordered. Tsung-pao and Mina to command. But sister Ling commits a serious mistake and the whole operation fails. Ling is suspended. She blames it on Mina...

programme.title: Remembering Leslie: The Intellectual Trio
programme.desc: Taiwanese detective Simon visits Hong Kong and is served by Wing, the young and witty cop. Their adventures begin when they encounter two pretty girls, Pretty eyes and Slant eyes. These two girls are pickpockets and have stolen a jade from the professional killer. The killer is desperate to get back his treasure, that even though the detectives try to protect the sisters, the four are in great danger...

programme.title: Two of A Kind
programme.desc: Chi is equipped with superb gaming skills, and because of that he is a very egoistic and lazy worker. One day he flirts with a girl who happen to be a mafia boss' girlfriend...

programme.title: American Grandson
programme.desc: A 60-year-old retired teacher in Shanghai promises to look after his American-born grandson who comes to visit him for a short period. They experience the clash of cultures and the inevitable generation gap when getting along...

programme.title: Up for the Rising Sun
programme.desc: Han Zhiyi‘s father took his life after he was rigged by Yi Zufen and Zhiyi was forced to close down her family business. She was distressed and went for a vacation with her mother. They left Shanghai and joined a cruise to Hong Kong. On the liner, she met billionaire Tong Paixian who fell deeply in love with her at first sight...

programme.title: Remembering Leslie: For Your Heart Only
programme.desc: Disc jockey Piggy Chan, mechanic Sapi and cousin Hayden are good friends. Three of them form a trio - LOVEBURSTERS. Piggy falls in love at first sight with Jane Yu. He tears down all obstacles to win her heart. With the victory, he resumes his inclination to flirt around. His friends and relatives are very upset to see him deserting Jane...

programme.title: Rich & Famous
programme.desc: Yung was caught red-handed in making a mischief. He and his friend Ying Hung decided to rob Chu Lo Tai. However, the attempt of robbery was unsuccessful and they were pursued...

programme.title: E25 - It's Time For A Surprise
programme.desc: JoJo, Gran Gran and Panda are helping Cynthia in her garden - JoJo loves how tall the sunflowers are. Cynthia gives JoJo a present of some sunflower seeds - JoJo can keep them ready to plant and grow more sunflowers next year.

programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: News On The Hour 1700
programme.desc: NEWS ON THE HOUR: Provides live coverage of news and current affairs from around the world, bringing viewers the latest breaking news.

programme.title: Phoenix Focus 1800
programme.desc: PHOENIX FOCUS: Focusing on the global political issues and major social events. Phoenix Focus delivers news highlights to viewers, presenting authoritative views.

programme.title: Phoenix Financial Daily Report
programme.desc: Phoenix Financial Daily Report : Aims to help audience figure out the financial clues from a choice selection of the hottest news of the day. The show also links up with experts from related fields to offer their profound insights. Presenting the latest figures and conducting public surveys on important topics, Phoenix Financial Daily Report generates a sweeping view on the trends that will bring you unique investment opportunity.

programme.title: Chief Editor's Time
programme.desc: Chief Editor's Time: Daily key issues around the world are discussed on Chief Editor's Time. In-depth analyses and discussion gives viewers a better understanding of the issue.

programme.desc: How do they persuade an oyster to grow a perfect pearl; how do they put the twist in classic Pennsylvania pretzels; and how do they build Venice's traditional gondolas?

programme.title: E16 - Indy Steering Wheels; Mixed Salad; Wind Turbines
programme.desc: On this episode of How it's Made: Indy Steering Wheels; Mixed Salad; Wind Turbines

programme.title: Octopus Under Threat - Searching For Clues Around The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Octopus is considered a delicacy - grilled, boiled, or fried. But rising demand has consequences, and in several regions of Europe, this intelligent cephalopod is already considered overfished.

programme.title: Relative Or Foe? - Neanderthals And Us
programme.desc: Although they were physically superior to us, Neanderthals did not prevail. What made them different and why did they become extinct? How close or hostile were they to modern man?

programme.title: KBS World News Today
programme.desc: KBS World Daily English News Anchor : Choi Kyu-yeon

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: E116
programme.desc: Marie's turbulent journey to find her father leads to the birth of an eccentric new family, one that proves stronger than blood and more persistent than DNA.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary college girl finds herself reincarnated as a background extra in a romance novel, only to spend a night with the story's most dangerously obsessive male lead. A romantic fantasy with no brakes begins!

programme.title: E3 - You Call That an Explosion?
programme.desc: Chris and Wayner forgo family time between performances to join local racer and wild man, Billy for an afternoon of shooting guns and blowing stuff up, while Brooke's mounting frustration doesn’t fare well for their return.

programme.title: E4 - Hot Rods and Speed Boats
programme.desc: The King Of The North drag race kicks off with Billy scrambling to prepare his hotrod for its race against Chris and the Jet Truck, in a challenge that will see the loser facing public humiliation.

programme.title: E1 - Rollercoaster Renovation
programme.desc: Heide Park Soltau, a german adventure park, offers adrenaline junkies many attractions and rides. The biggest crowd puller is the Colossos wooden roller coaster - the highest and fastest wooden roller coaster in Europe. But over twenty million passengers in fifteen years are taking their toll. The ride closes temporarily and renovation work begins. It is a gigantic task - 1500 metres of track have to be renewed. A complete replacement of all wooden rails has never been done on a comparable facility before. It is a renovation of superlatives for 12.5 million euros. The team is working with the heavy components at heights of up to 60 metres. Safety technology and its correct application are vital. The reopening date is approaching and the pressure is mounting.

programme.title: E5 - Second Chances
programme.desc: Ice Pilots NWTNewly minted copilot Jeff Tapper is excited for his first revenue DC-3, but his inexperience shows when he botches the approach and bounces the landing three times, nearly running off the runway. Meanwhile, for new rampie Prefkar Mony to realize his dream of becoming a DC-3 pilot, he needs to first pass the written IATRA test. He’s been studying for months, but on his first attempt, he fails. With the help of pilot/mechanic Chris Staples, Prefkar retakes the test and passes, but his victory celebration is short-lived when he’s blamed for leaving an expensive shipment of medicine marked “Do Not Freeze” in a courier van during a minus 30 weekend. Later, Mikey and Katie decide to find Joe a new dog and choose Muffy, a three-year-old dog from the SPCA who is ready to leave her pups. They bring her back to the hangar for a test drive. Joe brings DC-3 CUE out of retirement to test fly the plane for Buffalo’s summer sked duty and he brings along Jeff—and Muffy—to see if they’re

programme.title: E13 - Bad Blood
programme.desc: NCIS investigates the case of a Navy lieutenant found dead at a blood donation bank. Also, McGee needs help from the team to raise money for his twins' school fundraiser.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she's ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world. Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards' former family home. She's determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

programme.title: E85
programme.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.

programme.desc: A girls' night out takes an unexpected turn when NCIS is called to investigate the motive of a possible arsonist. Also, Torres struggles to find work/life balance.

programme.title: E144 - The Playground
programme.desc: Peppa and George go to the playground. Peppa's friends are also there. Peppa likes going on the swings but George does not because he's scared of heights, so Daddy Pig helps George go down the slide because it is too high and ends up getting stuck.

programme.title: E749 - Grampy Rabbit's Hovercraft
programme.desc: Grampy Rabbit saves the day when Grandpa Pig's boat sinks and drives everyone around on his Hovercraft!

programme.title: E203 - Beach Scanner / Tidy / Pets
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: E849 - Jukebox
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Granny and Grandpa Pig visit the sailing club where they find a juke box. They have fun dancing to all different types of music.

programme.title: E322 - Grandpa At The Playground
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig takes Peppa and George to the playground, but does not understand the children's rules.

programme.title: E213 - The Crew Builds A Reuse-It Station
programme.desc: When Speed Meister builds his own station for reusing trash, the pups have to clean up the mess all over Builder Cove.

programme.title: E202 - Barbabeau's Adventure
programme.desc: Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.desc: Peppa, George, Granny and Grandpa Pig visit the sailing club where they find a juke box. They have fun dancing to all different types of music.

programme.title: E1011 - Pups Stop The Falling Space Junk / Pups Stop The Giant Cuckoo
programme.desc: When Digi & Tal's space vacuum breaks it's up to the pups to save Mayor Humdinger from falling space debris. // Humdinger's Cuckoo Clock goes out of control. Ryder and the Pups must rescue Travis and get control of the Cuckoo to save Humdinger.

programme.title: E113 - Zeg And The Egg
programme.desc: Zeg is out smashing things with Blaze and AJ when he finds a tiny dinosaur egg. Now the three friends must embark on an epic journey across a prehistoric landscape to return the egg to its Truckodactyl mother.

programme.title: E126 - The Crew Builds A Treehouse / The Crew Builds A Chicken Feeder
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose's favorite tree might be off limits for climbing unless Rubble and Grandpa can come up with a solution. / The Crew build a feeder for Farmer Zoe's chickens, but when they get loose, it's up to the pups to safely rescue them.

programme.title: E211 - The Great Abuela Cookoff / Missing Map
programme.desc: After the Pokey Pigeons eat all of Abuela's elotes, Dora and Boots set out to find more ingredients for the Great Abuela Cook-off. / Dora, Boots and Backpack play an adventurous game of Hide-and-Seek to find Map.

Keep up with up-to-date issues from all over the world in politics, culture, sports, economy and healthcare. Get the latest facts and expert opinions about the most essential stories happening around us and draw your own conclusions. The show is well known for its dynamics due to live debates with its various guests.

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: Business
programme.desc: Business on France 24 gives you a perfect chance to get the business updates as they come and to be up to speed on international finances and economics. Business keeps you posted on everything that really matters in our fast moving world.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: Weird, Wild & Wonderful
programme.desc: Trek across Africa for a peek at the colorful, quirky survival strategies of its animals. See these furry, feathered, and scaled magicians, from flamboyant flamingos to vanishing lizards, find food, elude predators, and find mates against all odds.

programme.title: E4 - Africa's Edens
programme.desc: Zambia is home to three very special and different African Edens. The low, hot Luangwa River Valley, the high, dry Liuwa Plain and the cool, wet Kasanka National Park. Defined by the earth on which they sit and shaped by the seasons, each place offers something unique to the wildlife that chooses to live there.

programme.title: E2 - Life Givers
programme.desc: Learn how bees, butterflies, moths, and other pollinators keep our fields and forests fruitful, and weigh what life would be like if these busy bugs vanished. Witness a mysterious butterfly pilgrimage and a moth’s clever way of escaping hungry bats.

programme.title: E1 - Jungle Killers
programme.desc: A jaguar stalks the riverbank. A venomous snake is on the move. A Colombian tarantula waits for night fall. Watch as these fierce predators prowl through the jungle and bite into their next great meal.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story

programme.title: E2 - Jungle Love
programme.desc: It’s not easy to fall in love in the jungle. Find out how these animals turn to strategic mating strategies in order to pass on their genes. Meet monkeys who like monogamy, a bird who rivals Casanova, and a spider who’ll risk his life for love.

programme.title: E1 - Tropical
programme.desc: Circle the equator for a look at the diverse species that dwell in tropical forests. Meet a lone sloth growing a mini-forest, lemurs that share and share alike, and elephants that tend to their woodland gardens. Then explore the region’s dark side.

programme.title: E2 - Seasonal
programme.desc: Watch the seasons wax and wane and learn how trees and animals help one another survive. Witness spring fireflies dancing after dark, discover summer fungi that cool off overheated trees, and prep for autumn migrations as the leaves begin to fall.

programme.title: E1 - Born to Be Different
programme.desc: This episode of Amazing Animal Friends features a duck that won’t go in the water without a ride from her pooch pal, an elephant that thinks she’s a buffalo, and a herd of cows that adopt an orphaned deer.

programme.title: E113 - Journey to the Otter Side
programme.desc: The family's excited to take Jack to Lake World, Lily's favorite theme park. But when a lackluster day ends with realizing Lily's favorite ride has vanished, the kids must survive a thrilling adventure to find it and save their vacation.

programme.title: E523 - A Tale of Two Pipers
programme.desc: Henry gets an unexpected visitor claiming to be from the future. When a boy-robot killing machine steps onto the scene, The Gang must find a way to save everyone from an apocalyptic future.

programme.title: E112 - Follow the Sprinkles / Canyon Valley V. Dirk
programme.desc: When Lily starts digging to find out why her favorite ice cream truck is selling shaved ice, she uncovers a town-wide conspiracy. // Dirk is wrongfully accused of stealing a Canyon Valley landmark so Min comes out of lawyer retirement to help him.

programme.title: E102 - Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: E305 - Mouth Candy
programme.desc: Jasper’s enthusiasm in crime fighting leads him to send Captain Man and Kid Danger into incidents that are not crimes. So when he is falsely accused of a burglary and sent to jail, Henry and Ray must find a way to set him free.

programme.title: E102 - Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: E123 - The Starry Awards / Biorpsgiving
programme.desc: Patrick hosts an award ceremony. // Captain Doug Quasar meets Pat-Tron's robot family.

programme.title: E225 - Cuddle E. Hugs / Pat the Horse
programme.desc: SpongeBob's new friend is a giant fluffy hamster. There's one problem, though: no one else can see him! // Patrick wants to be a horse!

programme.title: E306 - SwellMelonFest
programme.desc: Chapa, Miles, Mika, and Bose are thrilled to have landed dates for the once-every-twenty-years SwellMelonFest until threats come in prompting Ray to make them work security. The threats become a reality when the kids must fight The Cell at the event.

programme.title: E422 - Up The Stairs!
programme.desc: When a local celebrity chef comes to Junk-N-Stuff to do his live show, Kid Danger and Captain Man are forced to hike a half a mile up the Man Stairs so they can be on the show.

programme.title: E201 - Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette / How to Bag a Beast
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: E110 - iAm Your Biggest Fan
programme.desc: iCarly's biggest fan, Mandy, is invited onto the show as a one-girl studio audience. Mandy turns out to be more of a stalker than a fan and the kids have to get rid of her.

programme.title: E304 - Selfie Improvement / No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. // Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

E10
programme.desc: 晴原柑九朗作為SDM本部首席代表兼氣象研究員利用智慧與知識，冒著生命危險站在最前線，保護人們的性命免受巨大氣象災害威脅，為使命奮鬥的故事。​

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 晴原柑九朗作為SDM本部首席代表兼氣象研究員利用智慧與知識，冒著生命危險站在最前線，保護人們的性命免受巨大氣象災害威脅，為使命奮鬥的故事。​

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: 職業為遺傳基因研究員的韓素珍十分相信基因會默默指引人的命運及人生，更認為遺傳基因隱藏著尋找真愛的秘密。在一個平安夜韓素珍和男友分手，一個人失落並醉倒街頭，卻意外把生髮水倒在婦產科醫生沈延宇身上，展開一段命運般的戀情。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 在華麗成功的三位朋友面前，出現一位 10 年前因她們的謊言而成為殺人犯的老朋友，她為揭開三人隱藏在假面之下的真面目而決定背水一戰。而四位老朋友也因一位男人面臨人生漩渦，彼此展開關乎嫉妒和慾望戰爭的故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.desc: In a revealing conversation, Tanya recounts the horror of the 10 years she spent in captivity in her predator's bedroom, and confides in Elizabeth about the realities of grooming.

programme.title: Have Fun At A Friend's House
Wife On The Phone Is Having Sex
Have Fun At A Friend's House
Wife On The Phone Is Having Sex
Have Fun At A Friend's House
Wife On The Phone Is Having Sex
Have Fun At A Friend's House
Wife On The Phone Is Having Sex
E1 - Orphle's Big Day of Trouble!
programme.desc: It's a big day of trouble, all thanks to Orphle! First, he uses a Multicolour Cloner to make different colored clones of himself, & it's up to Mila & Morphle to track them all down before they cause too much chaos. Then, when the friends are playing in a cardboard castle, Orphle mistakenly thinks they don't want to play with him & attacks it! From stealing a treasure map to teaming up with Winston, Orphle is causing trouble all day!

programme.title: E2 - Let's Play Together and Have Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to play together & have fun with Baby John & his friends! Baby John & Manny spend an exciting day at the pool, where they learn to follow all the safety procedures. Then, the two get a little competitive at the playground as they try to outdo each other building sandcastles & playing soccer. The fun continues as the boys set up their very own car wash after getting their electric cars all muddy!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E1 - Orphle's Big Day of Trouble!
programme.desc: It's a big day of trouble, all thanks to Orphle! First, he uses a Multicolour Cloner to make different colored clones of himself, & it's up to Mila & Morphle to track them all down before they cause too much chaos. Then, when the friends are playing in a cardboard castle, Orphle mistakenly thinks they don't want to play with him & attacks it! From stealing a treasure map to teaming up with Winston, Orphle is causing trouble all day!

programme.title: E4 - A Fun Day of Games & Construction
programme.desc: Get ready for playground games & construction fun! First, the crew has to build a crazy golf course! After they finish, they decide to try it out, but something goes wrong every time! Then, at the beach, Digley & Dazey challenge each other to a sandcastle competition. They each build castles that get bigger & sillier, & after some bickering, they decide to build one giant castle together! Plus, learn the alphabet & sing 'If You're Happy & You Know It'!

programme.title: E2 - JJ Sings & Dances to Classic Rhymes!
programme.desc: It's a dance party featuring all your favorite classic rhymes! Join JJ, Bella & Cece as they dance to 'Hey Diddle Diddle' while the cow jumps over the moon. The fun continues as they help their friend Humpty Dumpty get home after a great fall with the help of some sea creature friends! Then, get ready to rock out with a band of monkeys in a brand-new version of 'Rockabye Baby.' From 'Five Little Speckled Frogs' to 'Looby Loo,' it's a dance party full of classic fun!

programme.title: E2 - Pirate Songs & Fun Beach Games!
programme.desc: Ahoy, mateys! Join JJ for pirate songs & fun beach games! The adventure begins when JJ & Wally play pirates on the high seas but can't agree on where to find the hidden treasure! Then, when a wave washes away their sandcastle, a little crab helps them try again to build one that's nearly indestructible. The pirate fun continues as Wally tries to swipe JJ's five little duckies during bath time, leading to a sudsy chase to find the ducknapper!

programme.title: E3 - Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Join Blippi on an adventure to the wonders of our world & beyond! First, he travels to the tallest mountain on Earth, Mt. Everest, with his new friend Betty the Yeti. Then, he dives deep into the ocean to explore a kelp forest with Jerry the Jellyfish. The adventure gets explosive as Blippi & FETCH fly into a volcano! After exploring the Earth, Blippi blasts off into space to tour the solar system, learn about gravity on the moon & discover how rainbows get their amazing colors!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E2 - Tiny Heroes, Giant-Sized Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle may be small, but they're tiny heroes on giant-sized adventures! When a hamster gets stuck in a colorful cardboard maze, a rescue mission begins! Mila & Morphle get shrunk to hamster size & go into the maze to find their little furry pal. Then, when a whale gets stranded on the beach, the friends shrink it to get it back to the ocean. But when Winston races away with the tiny whale, the chase is on!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E2 - Tiny Heroes, Giant-Sized Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle may be small, but they're tiny heroes on giant-sized adventures! When a hamster gets stuck in a colorful cardboard maze, a rescue mission begins! Mila & Morphle get shrunk to hamster size & go into the maze to find their little furry pal. Then, when a whale gets stranded on the beach, the friends shrink it to get it back to the ocean. But when Winston races away with the tiny whale, the chase is on!

programme.title: E4 - Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning to play together with blocks, dancing, football & storytime! First, Jeff's neat block towers keep getting knocked over by Bubbles, & they must learn to share their space. Then, Fuse refuses to listen to instructions during a dancing game & has to learn how to work as a team. The lessons continue as Bubbles learns not to cheat to win a football game & Jeff has to decide if he will share his new book during storytime.

programme.title: E2 - Tiny Heroes, Giant-Sized Adventures!

programme.title: E2 - Pirate Songs & Fun Beach Games!
programme.desc: Ahoy, mateys! Join JJ for pirate songs & fun beach games! The adventure begins when JJ & Wally play pirates on the high seas but can't agree on where to find the hidden treasure! Then, when a wave washes away their sandcastle, a little crab helps them try again to build one that's nearly indestructible. The pirate fun continues as Wally tries to swipe JJ's five little duckies during bath time, leading to a sudsy chase to find the ducknapper!

programme.title: E4 - Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning to play together with blocks, dancing, football & storytime! First, Jeff's neat block towers keep getting knocked over by Bubbles, & they must learn to share their space. Then, Fuse refuses to listen to instructions during a dancing game & has to learn how to work as a team. The lessons continue as Bubbles learns not to cheat to win a football game & Jeff has to decide if he will share his new book during storytime.

programme.title: E3 - Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Join Blippi on an adventure to the wonders of our world & beyond! First, he travels to the tallest mountain on Earth, Mt. Everest, with his new friend Betty the Yeti. Then, he dives deep into the ocean to explore a kelp forest with Jerry the Jellyfish. The adventure gets explosive as Blippi & FETCH fly into a volcano! After exploring the Earth, Blippi blasts off into space to tour the solar system, learn about gravity on the moon & discover how rainbows get their amazing colors!

programme.title: E1 - The Wacky World of Winston & Orphle!
programme.desc: Welcome to the wacky world of Winston & Orphle! First, Winston tricks a Magic Pet into growing his robots of Mila & Morphle big enough to steal the entire Magic Pet Center! Then, Orphle causes trouble on his own when he runs away with the cake Mila made for her & Morphle's Matchiversary. The two troublemakers team up to try & get their hands on a special surprise gift, but it's up to Mila & Morphle to stop them!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E2 - JJ Sings & Dances to Classic Rhymes!
programme.desc: It's a dance party featuring all your favorite classic rhymes! Join JJ, Bella & Cece as they dance to 'Hey Diddle Diddle' while the cow jumps over the moon. The fun continues as they help their friend Humpty Dumpty get home after a great fall with the help of some sea creature friends! Then, get ready to rock out with a band of monkeys in a brand-new version of 'Rockabye Baby.' From 'Five Little Speckled Frogs' to 'Looby Loo,' it's a dance party full of classic fun!

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E10 - Against All Odds
programme.desc: Some of the world's most valiant figures overcome the most treacherous and downright bizarre circumstances. Like a man who survives the apocalypse, or a woman involved in three maritime disasters.

programme.title: E35 - Extraordinary Structures
programme.desc: Throughout the world, there are ancient structures that defy explanation. How were ancient civilisations able to build such extraordinary structures? And what purpose did they serve?

programme.title: E330 - Coal Gold
programme.desc: In West Virginia, the Wolfe brothers pick a century-old soda shop that's frozen in time. And a Methodist minister and circus ringleader opens the doors to his eye-popping collection.

programme.desc: Paul and his twin teenage sons, Thomas and Joseph, have been living a half-life – tranquility by day and torment by night.

programme.title: Piece By Piece
programme.desc: Follow this autobiography where Pharrell Williams shows his imaginative and creative process using Lego, as he constructs Lego models representing his artistic development. Each build reflects a different creative milestone.

programme.title: E1162
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.desc: Follows college students Red and Eden, who fall in love after being stranded on a deserted island following a plane crash, only to face challenges from their families' feud after they're rescued.

programme.title: E10 - The Best Puff Pastry Products On The Market
programme.desc: The show's team tests a dozen puff pastries to identify the crispiest and airiest ones, revealing significant disparities. Also: should sulfites in food be demonized; celebrating 50 years of Montreal's community gardens; the aromas of dahl.

programme.title: E8 - Gedinne
programme.desc: We head off to Gedinne, a commune in the Namur province, comprised of twelve bucolic, picturesque and gastronomic villages.

programme.title: E70
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E6 - A Different Way Of Raising Farm Animals
programme.desc: The way we treat and feed animals is increasingly being taken into account in buying decisions. Many producers are consequently doing everything possible to provide the best living conditions to their livestock.

programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. programme.title: E9 - Georgiana Viou
programme.desc: Michelin-starred chef Georgiana Viou highlights Mediterranean terroir in her restaurant in Nimes, an endless source of inspiration and creativity. On today's menu: a dish from her childhood in Benin, tevi dida-yam served with a puree of mild peppers and a spicy tomato sauce.

programme.title: E15 - From The Riviera To Snowy Peaks!
programme.desc: Heading to the Swiss Valais where the Vingt-Deux, a tiny restaurant, is enjoying huge success. The incredible adventure of the animated film ''Flow,'' largely created in Belgium. The Buissonniere store celebrates its 40th anniversary! And the Gilles of La Louviere at the prestigious Nice carnival.

programme.title: E10 - Acid Ocean
programme.desc: In 2025, humanity officially crossed a seventh planetary boundary: ocean acidification. A critical threshold with irreversible consequences for marine ecosystems. At the tip of Finistere, Fabrice Pernet must rethink his work as a researcher. He studies shellfish, sentinels of this disruption.

Strange Migration
programme.desc: The Rover is swallowed by a huge shark! Will and Fontaine end up in its mouth. It's up to Kaiko and Ant to try to find a way to free them.

programme.title: Farmers
programme.desc: Philippe examines different methods of farming. He visits an oyster farm and an aquaponics farm. He learns about a programme to train new farmers and help them establish their own agricultural businesses.

programme.title: Clownfish and White Tiger
programme.desc: We follow the aquarium team as they initiate their very own breeding program with the hope of finding many more clownfish to come. In the meantime, Lin Mao, the white tiger, has something wrong with his hip and the vets need to make a diagnosis.

programme.title: 3, 2, 1...Lift-off!
programme.desc: The chemical reaction that takes place in the engines of a real rocket produces a large amount of very hot gas that makes the rocket lift off into the sky. Eric mixes baking powder and water to create a chemical reaction strong enough to launch a toy rocket.

programme.title: Search for the Big Seven Part 3: Whale of a Time
programme.desc: A group of young explorers head for the sea on their search for the biggest of the Big Seven wild animals in South Africa – the whale. On the way they meet giant snails, noisy frogs and dolphins. They are about to give up their search when they spot two playful whales.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Curious Coin
programme.desc: Addison and Alex dig up what they think is an Ancient Roman coin in the community garden – then have a mystery to solve when it unexpectedly disappears.

programme.title: Hot Springs
programme.desc: Kit loses Mr. Battery in a hot spring.

programme.title: Ebb Keeps it Safe
programme.desc: After a game of beach frisbee, Ebb will be Frisbee Guard. When a gull tries to steal it, Bird stops him. Ebb buries the frisbee in the sand for safety but then loses it. The incoming tide reveals that Ebb kept it safe after all. Things Couldn't Be...

programme.title: Poconos
programme.desc: Pocono Mountains adventure: Zipped through Camelback Mountain, segway hike, tested wilderness survival skills, and tried wakeboarding at Lake Harmony. Packed week in the scenic outdoors!

programme.title: Hot Springs
programme.desc: Kit loses Mr. Battery in a hot spring.

programme.title: Surf's Up
programme.desc: Surf's up in Kiwifruit Valley, and Newts is determined to learn to surf like Heni. But one day the waves are huge and the next day they're gone and the kids have to figure out why.

programme.title: Bernoulli and Company
programme.desc: Eric learns how the Bernoulli Principle and playing with the flow of air can help him inflate a plastic bag. This same principle explains how airplanes fly, too.

programme.title: Giang Brothers: Renowned Circus Performers
programme.desc: The Giang brothers demonstrate how they used their incredible circus skills to achieve a GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the fastest blindfolded ascent and descent of an elevated platform while balancing on each other's head.

programme.title: E12 - 走進烏江寨的衣食住行
programme.desc: 以「山河即課堂，行走即成長」為主題，由何廣智、劉奕君、李雅娟、孫藝洲、楊超越組成的「非來游學團」踏入內蒙古的草原、沙漠、礦洞與峽谷，完成了一場真實、鮮活、不設腳本的人文探索，開啟一場兼具治愈感與知識性的旅程。

programme.title: E21 - 年度盛典 (上)
programme.desc: 將繼續以「音樂牽線，緣分發聲」為主題，賽制上進行了全面創新升級，帶來更具懸念的緣分匹配設定、更多元的趣味互動模式，以及更動人的團隊默契考驗；匯聚周深、薛之謙、單依純等10位實力歌手與新銳音樂人，通過盲選歌單、即興創作等環碰撞靈感，打造專屬合作舞台！

programme.title: E10 - 林依晨鄭元暢再合體
programme.desc: 由黎明、林依晨、魏晨、謝依霖、鄭元暢、盛一倫、朱珠、李小鵬、王濛、潘曉婷、唐曉天、陳楚河共十二位明星和奧運冠軍參加，以輪換搭檔的形式，在全球十二座體育城市展開一系列競技PK。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.desc: An intimate portrait of Ben Bradlee, tracing his remarkable ascent from an ill-stricken young Boston boy to one of the most pioneering and consequential journalistic figures of the 20th century.

programme.title: E9 - Big Flip Energy
programme.desc: House-flipping titan James takes on his toughest challenge yet. When his team finds a hoarder's nightmare with rotting walls, a sketchy layout and a collapsing roof, James is excited by the challenge.

programme.title: E56
programme.desc: It's an all in elimination and no wants to go home. There are four contestants and only three spots in the coveted Semi Final.

programme.title: E9 - Triangle Of Death
programme.desc: Jason has become a recluse because of a giant growth on the back of his neck. Marisa hates the red spider veins on her face, but is fearful of surgery because of previous problems.

programme.title: E10 - This Flippin' Guy
programme.desc: James butts heads when the competition, fellow flipper Rob, brings him a potential project: a split-level property with a massive yard in a prime neighbourhood. Rob's short on funds and full of confidence.

programme.title: E9 - Janice And Bob
programme.desc: Janice and Bob have spent decades dreaming of leaving city life behind for a peaceful home by the sea. With their daughter Sarah guiding them, they are ready to turn their coastal dreams into reality.

programme.title: E11 - Windy Spirit
programme.desc: Back on the road, Theresa spends a few days in Chicago. Before braving a ride at the top of one of the city's tallest buildings, Theresa brings comfort to a woman who lost her mom after a brief illness.

programme.title: The Floating Landscape
programme.desc: Mann haunted by the death of her lover, struggles to accept a new life. She goes to Qingdao in search of the landscape that her love spoke of in his final days. There, she meets a young postman Lit who runs along with Mann every day in the landscape search. While Lit gradually falls for Mann's beauty and passion, she can only think of her lost-lover and the painting...

programme.title: Handsome Guys
programme.desc: 'Do we lacking anything? We have a house, a truck, and very attractive.' Self-proclaimed tough guy Jae-pil and sexy guy Sang-gu leave an unforgettable first impression on their moving day. Despite becoming special surveillance targets for Police Chief Choi and Officer Nam, they are simply happy to start anew in their European-style dream house. However, happiness is short-lived as they are inadvertently mistaken for kidnappers while trying to rescue Mina, who almost drowns. Meanwhile, uninvited guests looking for Mina start appearing, and an ancient spirit sealed in the basement awakens, surrounding the house with dark energy.

programme.title: Driving Miss Wealthy
programme.desc: A man is hired to look after a spoiled rich girl, but is then pulled into a scheme meant to re-evaluate her life.

programme.title: E49 - The Message/Political Power/The Return
programme.desc: Steven and the Gems try to retrieve a message from the Wailing Stone.

programme.title: E117 - Need for Speed/Mutiny For The Bounty/Them's Fightin' Words!/Baby Buktu/Max to the Max
programme.desc: Touring Yellowstone, Ben uncovers a plot by the fast and furious LaGrange to find treasure buried below the national park, but with a little help from Old Faithful, Overflow is able to douse LaGrange's dreams.

programme.title: E253 - Communicate Openly/Royal Jelly/Strength Of A Grown Man/Had To Be There/Girls Night In
programme.desc: Bumbleebee becomes the 6th Titan and moves into the Tower but has a hard time adjusting.

programme.title: E36 - B. The Sweaters/The Internet/The Plan/The World/The Finale
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwins reputation is challenged and they really couldnt care less...

programme.title: E8 - Lisbon, Part 2

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 失意的女拳手劉鹽隻身踏上異國尋母之路，憑藉著拼命想要「贏一次」的野蠻生命力，在男主角盧天馳的支持與守護下，在拳擊與美食這兩個領域都闖出自己的天地，完成了人生的逆襲。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: What Lies Beaneath[Live]
programme.desc: After their best friend is killed, four high school friends lie to put a man in jail for the crime, but the lie comes back to haunt them years later when the man escapes prison and threatens their lives once more.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.desc: Dr. Abhimanyu, a misogynist, falls for Akshara, their daughter. Complications arise when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, also falls for him.

programme.title: E1972
programme.desc: Anupamaa sacrifices her ambitions for family, feeling uncredited. She finds empowerment by living on her terms after trials, showcasing a dramatic journey of resilience and independence.

programme.title: E595
programme.desc: Anjali Awasthi, a young and principled lawyer, stands tall against legal corruption and social injustice, determined to uncover truth and defend the innocent, no matter the cost.

programme.desc: Shivprasad and Shalini, an ordinary married couple, embrace love, laughter, and everyday joys, weaving a simple yet fulfilling life that celebrates togetherness and quiet contentment.

NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.
